intent_precise: Mass Spec Sample Prep: Using 50ml reagent tuberack (tuberack, slot 1), 1.5ml Eppendorf tuberacks for samples (tuberack, slot 3), 1.5ml Eppendorf tuberacks for antibodies (tuberack, slot 6). (1) Pause for manual intervention. (2) Distribute 2µL from source A1 to destination wells A1, A1, A1. (3) Pause: Remove well module from OT-2 and incubate in humidity chamber overnight at 4C to allow antibodies to adhere to slides. After overnight incubation, remove the slides from the humidity chamber and place in desiccator to dry. Once dry, place slides with attached well module back into OT-2 (4) Pause: Remove slide from OT-2 and place on benchtop shaker to     incubate in humidity chamber for 1 hour at room temperature (5) Pause: Remove slide from OT-2 and desiccate dry. Prepare serum samples in Eppendorf tubes (6) Pause: Remove slide from OT-2 and incubate on benchtop shaker in     humidity box for 2 hours at room temperature
intent_concise: Perform distribute to A1, A1, A1. (volumes 2µL-100µL)
intent: For the mass spec sample prep, you'll need to set up your reagent tuberack in slot 1, sample tuberacks in slot 3, and antibody tuberacks in slot 6. Start by pausing for any manual setup, then distribute 2µL from source A1 into the three A1 destination wells. After that, you'll need to remove the well module and let it incubate overnight at 4°C in the humidity chamber, then dry it in the desiccator before placing it back in the OT-2. The protocol continues with several more incubation steps - first on the benchtop shaker for 1 hour at room temperature in the humidity chamber, then after desiccating and preparing your serum samples in Eppendorf tubes, a final 2-hour incubation on the benchtop shaker at room temperature in the humidity box.

commands.message: Remove well module from OT-2 and incubate in humidity chamber overnight at 4C to allow antibodies to adhere to slides. After overnight incubation, remove the slides from the humidity chamber and place in desiccator to dry. Once dry, place slides with attached well module back into OT-2
Remove slide from OT-2 and place on benchtop shaker to     incubate in humidity chamber for 1 hour at room temperature
Remove slide from OT-2 and desiccate dry. Prepare serum samples in Eppendorf tubes
Remove slide from OT-2 and incubate on benchtop shaker in     humidity box for 2 hours at room temperature
